summary: Iteration 103 - Keyboard Navigation, Pinned Shortcuts & Staleness API. Fixed critical bug: 'Cannot access setActiveTab before initialization' error in WorkspacePage.js (moved setActiveTab useCallback before useEffect that references it). All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend features verified: keyboard nav (ArrowDown/Up/Home/End/Enter), pin icon visibility (hover + cyan when pinned), pinned section in sidebar, localStorage persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: WorkspacePage.js had setActiveTab useCallback defined AFTER useEffect that used it - caused Temporal Dead Zone error. Moved setActiveTab definition before the useEffect.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RAG_Pipeline content in agent knowledge base for RAG verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Keyboard navigation and pinned shortcuts fully implemented and tested. Key components: 1) WorkspacePage.js lines 188-230 - keyboard nav handler (ArrowDown/Up/Home/End/Enter), 2) Lines 163-177 - pinnedTabs state + togglePin, 3) Lines 499-554 - flyout with pin icons, 4) Sidebar.js lines 183-210 - pinned shortcuts section. Backend staleness API at GET /train/staleness?threshold_days=X returns total_chunks, stale_count, fresh_count, never_used_count, topic_staleness breakdown.

keyboard_navigation_flyout.ArrowDown_moves_focus: PASS - focusedIndex increments, bg-zinc-800/70 class applied

sidebar_pinned_section.collapsed_shows_icons_only: PASS - shows Pin icon only when collapsed

rag_pipeline.knowledge_stats: PASS - returns total, flagged, active counts

critical_fix.root_cause: Temporal Dead Zone - useEffect referenced setActiveTab before it was defined with useCallback
critical_fix.fix: Moved setActiveTab useCallback definition to line 188, before useEffect at line 200

mocked_apis.note: All APIs using real backend endpoints
